theme: Living with a Roommate vs. Living Alone

sentences.english: Do you prefer living alone or living with a roommate?
sentences.korean: 혼자 사는 것과 룸메이트와 사는 것 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: Use specific reasons and examples to support your answer.
I prefer living with a roommate rather than living alone.
First splitting rent and utility bills makes living much more affordable.
sentences.korean: 첫째 집세와 공과금을 나누면 생활이 훨씬 저렴해져요.

sentences.english: When I lived alone I spent almost sixty percent of my income on housing.
sentences.korean: 혼자 살 때 수입의 거의 60%를 주거비에 썼어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Living with a Roommate vs. Living Alone
The Best Way to Learn a Language
The Best Way to Relieve Stress

theme: Living with a Roommate vs. Living Alone

sentences.english: Second having someone around prevents loneliness.
sentences.korean: 둘째 누군가 주변에 있으면 외로움을 방지해줘요.

sentences.english: After a tough day at work it's nice to come home and have someone to talk to.
sentences.korean: 힘든 하루 일과 후 집에 와서 대화할 사람이 있으면 좋아요.

sentences.english: Of course there are challenges like sharing space and coordinating schedules but the benefits far outweigh the drawbacks.
sentences.korean: 물론 공간 공유와 일정 조율 같은 어려움이 있지만 장점이 단점보다 훨씬 커요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Living with a Roommate vs. Living Alone
A Hobby You Want to Start
